title: taraxacum shetlandicum
intro: Taraxacum shetlandicum, also known as the Shetland or Arctic Dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The roots of Taraxacum shetlandicum contain inulin and taraxasterol, which are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. This plant is used to promote digestion, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Taraxacum shetlandicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
